title: Moderation update: spam & harassment actions
body: Today we handled several high-severity reports. One account was permanently banned for posting repeated phishing links across multiple channels. Another member received a formal warning for sustained targeted harassment of newcomers; any further incidents may lead to suspension. A separate mass-report against a core maintainer was reviewed and closed as unfounded after verification. Thank you to everyone who reports issues in good faith so we can keep this space safe and constructive.
